description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll resembling a hand-stitched figure, with a body and head made of thick, brown yarn or fabric that mimics a knitted texture. The head is oversized and round, featuring two large, black, circular eyes and white thread stitches along the top and side, giving it a patchwork appearance. The doll's limbs are short and stubby, with visible seam lines and white stitching details on the arms and legs. It wears a small, black collar or scarf around its neck, fastened with a silver zipper detail at the front. The overall look is reminiscent of a handmade or 'sackboy' character, with a soft, plush-like surface and a whimsical, toy-like charm. The back of the head and body are plain, with the stitching and fabric texture continuing throughout.
description: A brown, hand-stitched humanoid doll with a large head, black eyes, white stitches, and a black collar with a zipper detail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large black eyes, white stitches on the head, and the black collar with a zipper at the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick yarn texture, side stitching on the head, and the profile of the collar and zipper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous brown knitted texture and white stitches running down the back of the head, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side stitching, yarn texture, and the profile of the collar and zipper.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a small, black collar or scarf with a silver zipper detail, evoking a casual, playful style reminiscent of the 'Sackboy' character from LittleBigPlanet. The rest of the body is covered in a brown, knitted-texture fabric with visible white stitches, giving it a handmade, patchwork appearance.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms relaxed and slightly bent at the sides, and legs straight and parallel. The posture is static and neutral, typical of a display or plush toy.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression, with large, round black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a simple, expressionless look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered in brown, knitted-texture fabric with white stitches.
